user.title: Set Up VicEmergency Monitoring Zone
user.description: Choose a name for this monitoring zone (e.g. Home, Work, Farm).

location.title: Select Monitoring Area
location.description: Place the pin and adjust the radius to define which incidents to track. Scroll down to submit.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the VicEmergency data feed. Please try again later.
error.no_location: Please select a location on the map.

abort.already_configured: A zone is already configured at this location.
